title: Improve bot team coordination and strategic intelligence

requirements.summary: Enhance Colonizer bot AI teamwork with role-based coordination
acceptanceCriteria: Colonizer bots spread across all 3 strategic points rather than clustering on one
Engineer bots prioritize the Build action when adjacent to Fort territory instead of attacking
Captain bots reposition toward clusters of allied units to activate their buff aura
Missionary bots target wounded allies with healing actions before engaging enemies
Musket Soldier bots prefer open-field territories and exploit their range bonus there

file_operations.description: Implement role-based decision trees for Colonizer bot classes: Engineer bots prioritize Build actions when adjacent to Fort territories; Captain bots calculate allied unit density and reposition to maximize buff aura coverage; Musket Soldier bots evaluate terrain type and prefer open-field strategic points; Missionary bots scan for wounded allies (health < max) within movement range and prioritize healing over combat. Add logic to prevent multiple Colonizer bots from converging on the same strategic point by checking if another bot is already capturing or positioned there.

requirements.summary: Enhance Native Peoples bot AI teamwork with defensive and ambush tactics
acceptanceCriteria: Forest Warrior bots position in forest territories and wait for enemies rather than charging into open fields
Spirit Hunter bots use the enemy-marking ability on Engineer or high-value Colonizer targets
Shaman bots select the lowest-health allied unit as healing target each turn
Sentinel bots prioritize the Destroy action on any visible enemy construction over offensive moves
When a territory's capture progress bar is active, 2 or more Native bots converge on that territory to interrupt the capture

file_operations.description: Implement defensive and ambush tactics for Native Peoples bot classes: Forest Warrior bots evaluate current position terrain and prefer holding forest territories rather than moving to open fields, waiting for enemies to enter attack range; Spirit Hunter bots identify high-value enemy targets (Engineers near Fort, Captains with multiple allies nearby) and use marking abilities; Shaman bots sort allied units by current health percentage and select the lowest-health target for healing actions; Sentinel bots scan visible territories for enemy constructions (Towers, Fortresses) and prioritize Destroy actions. Add convergence logic to detect active territory captures (captureProgress > 0 and < required threshold) and route multiple Native bots to interrupt.

requirements.summary: Implement shared bot team state for coordinated decision-making
acceptanceCriteria: A shared team context object is computed at the start of each bot team's turn before any individual unit acts
No two bot units on the same team are assigned the identical capture-point target unless all other points are covered
Bot units flagged as 'healer role' (Shaman, Missionary) do not attempt to capture territories when wounded allies are within movement range
Bot decision logs (console or comment-traceable) reflect role assignments from the shared state

file_operations.description: Create a computeTeamContext function that runs once per bot team turn and returns a shared state object containing: contested/uncaptured strategic point IDs, critically wounded allied units (health < 30% of max), visible enemy construction locations, and role assignments tracking which bot IDs have been assigned capture/defend/heal/build/destroy roles. Modify the main bot action selection logic to accept this context as a parameter and consult it before making decisions. Add assignment tracking to prevent duplicate targeting: when a bot selects a strategic point to capture, mark that point as 'assigned' in the context; when a healer bot is within range of wounded allies, mark it as 'healer role' and skip territory capture logic. Include console.log statements for role assignments to enable traceability during testing.
